Home Shipping Options

Shipping Options

DELIVERY TIMEFRAMES

QUICK SHIP LOCKERS

Stadium, Elite & Model X
24" width · 2–4 weeks · Lock box & vented front included

When you need lockers fast, we keep Stadium, Elite, and Model X ready to ship in 2–4 weeks. Each comes in one finish—black, dark grey, or light grey—at 24" width with lock box and vented front standard. Same solid wood construction and 5-year warranty as our custom builds. We run production year-round so these are available when you need them, and we pass the savings on in our pricing.

Each quick ship locker includes:

  • Lock box
  • Vented front panel
  • Hooks
  • 24" wide × 24" deep (Stadium); 24" width (Elite, Model X)
  • 5-year warranty

Stadium

$749

Black

Elite

$749

Dark grey

Model X

$749

Light grey

DELIVERY TIMEFRAMES

CUSTOM ORDER

Explore custom lockers
10–12 weeks | Any size & configuration | Team colors, logos, name plates

Need lockers built to your exact specs? Our custom order option gives you full control: any width and height, custom colors and wood finishes, team logos and graphics, name plates, and interior layouts. Every detail is tailored to your facility and brand. Includes a free design consultation so we can match your timeline and budget. Ideal for new builds, renovations, or programs that want a one-of-a-kind locker room.

Explore options Get custom quote

PlayerStall

Luxury custom-built wood lockers with full color options. Quick ship in one month (24" width) or custom-built in three months. 30+ years of craftsmanship.

2934 200 Street, Langley, BC V2Z 2C1 Canada

sales@playerstall.com

1 888 584 1444

QUICK CONTACT INFO

Premium wood lockers at unbeatable prices. Quick ship in 2–4 weeks or custom in 8–12 weeks. We'll match any USA competitor's price. Call for a free quote.

b Monday-Friday: 9am to 5pm;
Saturday: 10am to 2pm

z 2934 200 Street, Langley, BC V2Z 2C1 Canada
